introPopup.title: Would you prefer us to do everything for you?

introPopup.btnSubmit: Call Me Back to activate bonuses

introSuccess.title: Congratulations!
introSuccess.text: Preferring to do everything yourself? It's convenient and fast. You choose the desired area of health support, and bonuses will be applied automatically.

course.title: Course choice
course.subtitle: The gift amount on the card can only be used to purchase our products.*

courses.subtitle: Опорно-рухова система
description: Посилений курс із додатковими упаковками Steplex та Cardiform!
Ви забезпечуєте суглобам більш тривалу підтримку. Це сприяє відновленню роботи не лише суглобів, а й кісток та усієї опорно-рухової системи.

courses.subtitle: Максимальний баланс цукру та енергія
description: Посилений курс із додатковими упаковками Dialos та Guavital+!
Довша підтримка сприяє стабільному рівню енергії та допомагає покращити самопочуття людей які контролюють рівень цукру в крові.

courses.subtitle: Чисте серце та судини
description: Посилений курс із додатковими упаковками Tonerin та Ultraxal!
Сприяє нормалізації усієї серцево-судинної системи та тиску на довготривалий період.

courses.subtitle: Повне перевтілення
description: Посилений курс із додатковими упаковками Slimital та OzenmicSoft!
Більша кількість продукту дозволяє подовжити курс підтримки пришвидшеного метаболізму, що дозволить закріпити результат без повернення кілограмів.

courses.subtitle: Максимальна активність
description: Посилений курс із додатковими упаковками Vermixin та Ultraxal!
Сприяє стабільному припливу сил, який накопичується і підтримує вашу активність протягом усього курсу і ще 3 місяці після.

courses.subtitle: Довголіття
description: Посилений курс із додатковими упаковками Ultraxal та Tonerin!
Додаткові упаковки допомагають створити більш стійку основу для вашого здоров'я. Це сприяє комплексному зміцненню ключових органів та систем для загального самопочуття на довгий час.

problems.title: Choose the direction you are interested in:

categories.name: Joint care
list: Knees ache because of the weather
My back hurts and it's hard to move

categories.name: Pressure / Blood Vessels / Swelling
list: My legs are very swollen in the evening

categories.name: Slimness and metabolism
list: Weight stays the same or only increases over the years
My favorite clothes have become too tight
There is a heaviness in the body that was not there before

categories.name: Overall health improvement
list: I constantly worry about my health
I want to feel protected and active

courses.title: Joints and movement
courses.description: When your knees or back hurt more and more often, it's not just the joints themselves. The body often does not have enough resources to relieve stiffness. If you just wait, it won't get any easier; a comprehensive approach is needed.
benefitsList: first, the feeling of heaviness and "aching" is removed;
flexibility gradually returns;
joints receive the necessary nutrition to move comfortably.
courses.recommendTitle: We have selected a set for you:

courses.recommendTitle: We have selected a set for you:

courses.title: Sugar Balance Kit
courses.description: Constant cravings for sweets are a signal that the body is having difficulty maintaining energy balance. Sudden spikes in sugar are debilitating, so it's important to act gently and stress-free.
courses.benefitsTitle: What you will achieve in the course:
benefitsList: glucose levels stabilize (you no longer feel "sleepy" after eating);
the obsessive desire to eat something sweet disappears;
strength appears, and the overall state of health becomes even and stable.

courses.recommendTitle: We have selected a set for you:

courses.title: Pressure and Blood Vessels Kit
courses.description: If your blood pressure is unstable and your legs are swollen, this is a sign that your blood vessels have lost their elasticity and your heart is having a hard time working. Do not ignore these signals.
courses.benefitsTitle: How the body returns to normal:
benefitsList: first, excess water comes out (swelling and feeling of heaviness in the legs disappear);
the walls of blood vessels are strengthened so that they respond better to weather changes;
the pressure stabilizes, and the head becomes clear and "light".

courses.recommendTitle: We have selected a set for you:

courses.title: Weight Control Kit
courses.description: When weight “stagnates,” it’s a very common situation, especially with age. It is harder for the body to break down food than before. That is why it is important to choose the right course, and not expect a miracle in one day.
courses.benefitsTitle: Usually the body acts step by step:
benefitsList: first curbs appetite;
removes puffiness and bloating;
adjusts the metabolism so that the weight finally begins to melt away.

courses.title: Fatigue Kit (Energy)
courses.description: Feeling "broken" in the morning often means that the body has accumulated too much excess and simply cannot cope with it. Regular coffee won't help here — you need to clean your system from the inside.
benefitsList: the body is gently cleansed of accumulated toxins;
the work of the stomach and intestines improves (heaviness disappears);
You start to get enough sleep and feel a surge of energy that you haven't had in a long time.

improving digestion to keep the immune system strong;
protect your vision and hearing to make you feel confident and active.
